title: Impressum (Legal Notice) — DIGI-METER
description: Legal notice (Impressum) for the DIGI-METER website — information about the website operator as required under German law (§ 5 DDG).

strings.source: Legal notice and information about the operator of this website, as required under German law (§ 5 Digitale-Dienste-Gesetz, DDG).
strings.value: Legal notice and information about the operator of this website, as required under German law (§ 5 Digitale-Dienste-Gesetz, DDG).

strings.source: This website is designed, hosted, and operated by Outside Media & Knowledge, the lead partner for communication and dissemination in the DIGI-METER consortium.

strings.source: The content of this website has been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider we are responsible for our own content on this website in accordance with general legislation (Digitale-Dienste-Gesetz, DDG). We are, however, not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
